scripts.build: bun run --filter './packages/*' build && bun run --filter './docs' build
scripts.release:react: bun run build && bun publish --cwd packages/react
scripts.release:solid: bun run build && bun publish --cwd packages/solid
scripts.release:vue: bun run build && bun publish --cwd packages/vue
scripts.release:eslint-plugin: bun run build && bun publish --cwd packages/eslint-plugin
scripts.release:prettier-plugin: bun run build && bun publish --cwd packages/prettier-plugin
